name: TNT Optimiser
description: Reduces server-side CPU cost of large TNT chain reactions. Vanilla's per-explosion ray-cast scan is replaced by a breadth-first traversal that visits each block in the blast sphere once and de-duplicates work across overlapping explosions in the same tick. Explosion radius, entity damage and knockback are unchanged; the exact set of destroyed blocks may differ slightly from vanilla's ray-cast crater by design.
